account.editProfileDesc: Update your display name and avatar.
account.instanceSettingsDesc: Jump back to the last settings page you opened.
account.documentationDesc: Open Paperclip docs in a new tab.

agents.title: Agents
agents.askCeo: Ask the CEO to create a new agent
agents.askCeoDesc: We recommend letting your CEO handle agent setup — they know the org structure and can configure reporting, permissions, and adapters.
agents.advancedChooseAdapter: Choose your adapter type for advanced setup.
agents.noMatchFilter: No agents match the selected filter.
agents.createFirst: Create your first agent to get started.
agents.selectCompany: Select a company to view agents.

issues.title: Issues
issues.selectCompany: Select a company to view issues.

goals.title: Goals
goals.selectCompany: Select a company to view goals.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeSetup: Welcome to Paperclip. Set up your first company and agent to get started.
dashboard.selectCompany: Create or select a company to view the dashboard.

costs.title: Costs
costs.subtitle: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
costs.selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.
costs.selectDateRange: Select a start and end date to load data.
costs.inferenceLedgerDesc: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
costs.financeLedgerDesc: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
costs.byAgentDesc: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
costs.byProjectDesc: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
costs.byBillerDesc: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
costs.noCostEventsInPeriod: No cost events in this period.
costs.noBillableEvents: No billable events in this period.
costs.budgetControlPlaneDesc: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
costs.activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
costs.pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
costs.resolveIncidents: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
costs.noBudgetPolicies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.

companySettings.title: Company Settings
companySettings.noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
companySettings.companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
companySettings.descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
companySettings.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
companySettings.brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
companySettings.requireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
companySettings.requireApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
companySettings.archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.

activity.selectCompany: Select a company to view activity.

projectDetail.selectCompanyProjects: Select a company to view projects.

myIssues.title: My Issues
myIssues.selectCompany: Select a company to view your issues.

routines.title: Routines
routines.subtitle: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
routines.noRoutines: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
routines.selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
routines.newRoutineDesc: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
routines.advancedDeliveryDesc: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
routines.afterCreation: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.

instanceSettings.title: Instance Settings
instanceSettings.schedulerHeartbeatsDesc: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instanceSettings.noHeartbeats: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

instanceGeneral.title: General
instanceGeneral.subtitle: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
instanceGeneral.censorUsernameDesc: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
instanceGeneral.keyboardShortcutsDesc: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instanceGeneral.backupRetentionDesc: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.
instanceGeneral.aiFeedbackSharingDesc: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instanceGeneral.dontAllowDesc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
instanceGeneral.signOutDesc: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

instanceExperimental.title: Experimental
instanceExperimental.subtitle: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
instanceExperimental.isolatedWorkspacesDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
instanceExperimental.autoRestartDevServerDesc: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
instanceExperimental.agentMemoryDesc: Enable persistent memory for Hermes agents. When active, Hermes will store and recall facts across sessions using its built-in memory tooling.
instanceExperimental.autoSkillCreationDesc: When a Hermes agent run succeeds, automatically save any skills it proposes as company skills so they can be reused by other agents.

profileSettings.title: Profile
profileSettings.subtitle: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profileSettings.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
profileSettings.emailHint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.

org.title: Org Chart
org.selectCompany: Select a company to view org chart.
org.noAgents: No agents in the organization. Create agents to build your org chart.

orgChart.title: Org Chart
orgChart.selectCompany: Select a company to view the org chart.

companies.title: Companies
companies.deleteConfirm: Delete this company and all its data? This cannot be undone.

projectProperties.name: Name
projectProperties.enableIsolatedCheckoutsDesc: Let issues choose between the project's primary checkout and an isolated execution workspace.
projectProperties.newIssuesDefaultIsolated: New issues default to isolated checkout
projectProperties.newIssuesDefaultIsolatedDesc: If disabled, new issues stay on the project's primary checkout unless someone opts in.
projectProperties.archiveDesc: Archive this project to hide it from the sidebar and project selectors.
projectProperties.unarchiveDesc: Unarchive this project to restore it in the sidebar and project selectors.

onboarding.nameYourCompanyDesc: This is the organization your agents will work for.
onboarding.missionPlaceholder: What is this company trying to achieve?
onboarding.createFirstAgentDesc: Choose how this agent will run tasks.
onboarding.adapterEnvCheckDesc: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.
onboarding.giveItSomethingToDoDesc: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
onboarding.readyToLaunchDesc: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

keyboardShortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
keyboardShortcuts.search: Search current page or quick search
keyboardShortcuts.closeHint: Press Esc to close · Shortcuts are disabled in text fields

routineVariables.variablesDesc: Detected from `{{name}}` placeholders in the routine title and instructions.
routineVariables.promptUser: Prompt the user for this value before each manual run.
routineVariables.label: Label
routineVariables.placeholderHint: Use `{{variable_name}}` placeholders in the instructions to prompt for inputs when the routine runs.

adapterManager.title: Adapters
adapterManager.installExternalDesc: Add an adapter from npm or a local path.
adapterManager.installAdapterHint: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
adapterManager.alphaDesc: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change.

companyInvites.title: Company Invites
companyInvites.description: Create human invite links for company access. New invite links are copied to your clipboard when they are generated.
companyInvites.createInviteDesc: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.
companyInvites.inviteHistoryDesc: Review invite status, role, inviter, and any linked join request.
companyInvites.noInvites: No invites have been created for this company yet.
companyInvites.selectCompany: Select a company to manage invites.

companySkills.title: Skills
companySkills.selectCompany: Select a company to manage skills.

companyAccess.title: Company Access
companyAccess.description: Manage company user memberships, membership status, and explicit permission grants.
companyAccess.humansDesc: Manage human company memberships, status, and grants here.
companyAccess.pendingHumanJoinsDesc: Review human join requests before they become active company members.
companyAccess.grantsDesc: Roles provide implicit grants automatically. Explicit grants below are only for overrides and extra access.
companyAccess.selectCompany: Select a company to manage access.
companyAccess.noMembers: No user memberships found for this company yet.

companyExport.title: Export
companyExport.selectFilePreview: Select a file to preview its contents.

companyImport.title: Import
companyImport.importSourceDesc: Choose a GitHub repo or upload a local Paperclip zip package.
companyImport.selectCompany: Select a company to import into.

pluginManager.title: Plugin Manager
pluginManager.installPluginDesc: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.
pluginManager.noPluginsHint: Install a plugin to extend functionality.
pluginManager.alphaDesc: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.

pluginSettings.title: Plugin Settings
pluginSettings.author: Author
pluginSettings.noSettings: This plugin does not require any settings.

pluginPage.selectCompany: Select a company to view this page.

approvalDetail.approvalConfirmedDesc: Requesting agent was notified to review this approval and linked issues.

executionWorkspace.title: Execution workspace
executionWorkspace.workspaceSettingsDesc: Edit the concrete path, repo, branch, provisioning, teardown, and runtime overrides.

feedbackButtons.saveFeedbackPreferenceDesc: Choose whether voted AI outputs can be shared with Paperclip Labs. This answer becomes the default for future thumbs up and thumbs down votes.
feedbackButtons.voteAlwaysSaved: This vote is always saved locally.
feedbackButtons.alwaysAllowExplain: Choose <bold>Always allow</bold> to share this vote and future voted AI outputs. Choose <bold>Don't allow</bold> to keep this vote and future votes local.
feedbackButtons.changeInSettings: You can change this later in Instance Settings > General.

devRestart.backendChangedAndMigrations: backend files changed and migrations are pending
devRestart.pendingMigrations: pending migrations need a fresh boot
devRestart.backendChanged: backend files changed since this server booted
devRestart.waitingForRuns: Waiting for {{count}} live run to finish
devRestart.waitingForRuns_other: Waiting for {{count}} live runs to finish
devRestart.autoRestartIdle: Auto-restart will trigger when the instance is idle
devRestart.restartManual: Restart pnpm dev:once after the active work is safe to interrupt

cloudAccessGate.noAdminYetWithInvite: No instance admin exists yet. A bootstrap invite is already active. Check your Paperclip startup logs for the first admin invite URL, or run this command to rotate it:
cloudAccessGate.noAdminYet: No instance admin exists yet. Run this command in your Paperclip environment to generate the first admin invite URL:
cloudAccessGate.noCompanyAccessDesc: This account is signed in, but it does not have an active company membership or instance-admin access on this Paperclip instance.
cloudAccessGate.useInviteOrSignIn: Use a company invite or sign in with an account that already belongs to this org.

authPage.signInDesc: Use your email and password to access this instance.
authPage.signUpDesc: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
authPage.name: Name
authPage.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.

budgetCard.spendingReached: Spending reached {{observed}} against a limit of {{limit}}.
budgetCard.projectPaused: Project execution is paused. New work in this project will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
budgetCard.scopePaused: This scope is paused. New heartbeats will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
budgetCard.budgetMustExceed: The new budget must exceed current observed spend.
budgetCard.projectPausedPolicy: Execution is paused for this project until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
budgetCard.scopePausedPolicy: Heartbeats are paused for this scope until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
budgetCard.invalidAmount: Enter a valid non-negative dollar amount.

pathInstructions.title: How to get a full path
pathInstructions.description: Paste the absolute path (e.g. /Users/you/project) into the input field.

routineRunDialog.description: Choose the agent and optional project for this one run. Routine defaults are prefilled and won't be changed.
routineRunDialog.defaultAgentRequired: Default agent required for this run.
routineRunDialog.chooseWorkspace: Choose an existing workspace before running.

workspaceControls.servicesDesc: Long-running commands that Paperclip can supervise for this workspace.
workspaceControls.jobsDesc: One-shot commands that run now and exit when they finish.
workspaceControls.untrackedServicesDesc: Running services that no longer match the current workspace command config.
workspaceControls.jobsAvailable: {{count}} job available to run on demand.
workspaceControls.jobsAvailable_other: {{count}} jobs available to run on demand.
workspaceControls.commandsControlled: Each command can be controlled independently.
workspaceControls.noServices: No services are configured for this workspace.
workspaceControls.noJobs: No one-shot jobs are configured for this workspace.

documentDiff.sameRevision: Both sides are the same revision.

issueDocuments.historicalPreview: This is a historical preview. Restoring it creates a new latest revision and keeps history append-only.
issueDocuments.outOfDateDesc: This document changed while you were editing. Your local draft is preserved and autosave is paused.
issueDocuments.deleteConfirm: Delete this document? This cannot be undone.

inviteLanding.inviteExpiredOrUsed: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
inviteLanding.requestNotApproved: This join request was not approved.
inviteLanding.inviteAlreadyUsed: This invite has already been used.
inviteLanding.awaitingApproval: Your request is still awaiting approval. {{approver}} must approve your request to join.
inviteLanding.askToApprove: Ask them to visit <link>Company Settings → Access</link> to approve your request.
inviteLanding.refreshAfterApproved: Refresh this page after you've been approved — you'll be redirected automatically.
inviteLanding.youveBeenInvited: You've been invited to join Paperclip
inviteLanding.agentFormDesc: Review the invite details, then submit the agent information below to start the join request.
inviteLanding.createAccountFirst: Create your Paperclip account first. If you already have one, switch to sign in and continue the invite with the same email.
inviteLanding.accountReadyDesc: Your account is ready. Review the invite details, then accept it to continue.
inviteLanding.agentInviteDesc: This invite will create an approval request for a new agent in {{company}}.
inviteLanding.createAccountDesc: Start with a Paperclip account. After that, you'll come right back here to accept the invite for {{company}}.
inviteLanding.signInDesc: Use the Paperclip account that already matches this invite. If you do not have one yet, switch back to create account.
inviteLanding.name: Name
inviteLanding.alreadySignedUp: Already signed up before? Use the existing-account option instead so the invite lands on the right Paperclip user.
inviteLanding.noAccountYet: No account yet? Switch back to create account so you can accept the invite with a new login.
inviteLanding.submitOrComplete: submit or complete your join request for {{company}}
inviteLanding.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
